name: GmailSearch
description: Search or list Gmail emails using Gmail search syntax (e.g. 'is:unread', 'from:user@example.com', 'subject:meeting')

query.description: Gmail search query (same syntax as Gmail search bar). Examples: 'is:unread', 'from:boss@company.com', 'subject:invoice after:2024/01/01'

maxResults.description: Maximum number of emails to return (default: 10)

pageToken.description: Page token for fetching next page of results

name: GmailRead
description: Read the full content of a Gmail email by its message ID
searchHint: read a Gmail message by id

messageId.description: The Gmail message ID (from GmailSearch results)

name: GmailSend
description: Send a new email via Gmail

name: GmailReply
description: Reply to an existing Gmail thread. Automatically extracts threadId, subject, and recipient from the original message.

messageId.description: The message ID to reply to (from GmailSearch or GmailRead)

name: GmailModify
description: Modify a Gmail message's labels/state (mark read/unread, archive, trash, star) or apply/remove custom labels
searchHint: modify Gmail labels or message state

action.description: Action to perform: read, unread, archive, unarchive, trash, untrash, star, unstar

addLabelIds.description: Label IDs to add to the message (use GmailLabelsList to get IDs)

removeLabelIds.description: Label IDs to remove from the message

name: GmailLabelsList
description: List all Gmail labels (both system and user-created)

name: GmailLabelsCreate
description: Create a new Gmail label (like a folder) to organize emails

showInList.description: Visibility in label list: show, hide, showIfUnread (default: show)

showInMessageList.description: Visibility in message list: show, hide (default: show)
